name: mac-messages-mcp
description: Query, search, and send macOS Messages through a local MCP server.
long_description: Mac Messages MCP runs locally on macOS and provides Claude Desktop with tools for reading recent Messages, fuzzy-searching conversations, resolving contacts, sending iMessage/SMS messages, listing chats, checking permissions, and finding or fetching message attachments. It requires Full Disk Access for Claude Desktop or the terminal used to run it.

tools.name: tool_get_recent_messages
tools.description: Read recent macOS Messages, optionally filtered by contact.

tools.name: tool_send_message
tools.description: Send an iMessage or SMS/RCS message through the Messages app.

tools.name: tool_find_contact
tools.description: Find a contact by fuzzy name matching.

tools.name: tool_check_db_access
tools.description: Diagnose access to the macOS Messages database.

tools.name: tool_check_contacts
tools.description: List sample contacts available from AddressBook.

tools.name: tool_check_addressbook
tools.description: Diagnose access to the macOS AddressBook database.

tools.name: tool_get_chats
tools.description: List named group chats from Messages.

tools.name: tool_check_imessage_availability
tools.description: Check whether a recipient appears to have iMessage available.

tools.name: tool_fuzzy_search_messages
tools.description: Fuzzy-search message text across a configurable time window.

tools.name: tool_search_attachments
tools.description: Search message attachments by date range, contact, and MIME type.

tools.name: tool_get_attachment
tools.description: Fetch an attachment by database id, returning inline images when safe.
